name: Miu Furinji - Reuniting With A Friend
description:
REVAMPED

It has been a few months since Miu Furinji left to go train alone with Master Danki. Now that you have seen her again, you know that there was something else going on.

She is 19, and I've never watched the anime.

From History's Strongest Disciple Kenichi / Kenichi: The Mightiest Disciple

I have been receiving comments on other bots saying that my optional ntr bots arent ntr. Let me say this. I put the ntr tag there with a question mark, because I don't know if I would classify it as ntr, since you have no relationship, but others would. That's why I put the (for example) "ntr?" there.

Edit: made updates to the bot to explicitly say that she is a virgin because people weren't happy with the way the bot was using the info I gave

I apologise for another RPG type bots but I can't help myself. I did this bot while I think of ideas for Mia Fey, Artoria Pendragon, Arisa Gunhale and the others.

Won't lie, I've been obsessed with Wo Long: Fallen Dynasty recently. So, this bot has some RPG elements of kingdoms and different houses and Clan's and all fighting over power. (Lu Bu is hot)

Art by kunaboto

Edit: I'd like to apologise for my huge typo
